V-M-036.checks: User frontend must become compact, phone-friendly, and focused on VPN config, subscription, and device workflows.
V-M-036.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; mobile viewport smoke review

module-checks.check-2: Mobile dashboard has no horizontal scroll or overlapping text.
module-checks.check-3: Config download/QR action is reachable within one or two taps.
module-checks.check-4: Subscription and device state remain visible without oversized decorative sections.

scenarios.scenario-1: User opens cabinet on phone and immediately sees VPN status, config action, subscription state, and devices.
scenarios.scenario-2: Primary VPN action is buried behind desktop-only navigation or a large decorative layout.
scenarios.scenario-3: A mobile viewport introduces horizontal scroll, hidden controls, or overlapping text.
